{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blackflame Truegold's scales
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] has located scales from a [[Blackflame]] [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Scales from the [[Path of Black Flame]] can accelerate cycling.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
